summary: Your resume shows strong alignment with the technical requirements but has gaps in leadership experience and specific domain knowledge mentioned in the job description.

strengths.title: Technical Skills Match
strengths.description: React, TypeScript, and Node.js experience aligns well with requirements.

strengths.title: Years of Experience
strengths.description: Your 5+ years exceeds the 3-year minimum requirement.

strengths.title: Education
strengths.description: BS in Computer Science matches the preferred qualification.

strengths.title: Project Experience
strengths.description: Multiple full-stack projects demonstrate relevant hands-on experience.

weaknesses.title: Leadership Experience
weaknesses.description: JD requires team lead experience; resume shows individual contributor roles only.

weaknesses.title: Cloud Infrastructure
weaknesses.description: AWS/GCP certifications mentioned in JD are missing from resume.

weaknesses.title: Domain Knowledge
weaknesses.description: FinTech experience is preferred but not evident in your background.
